prompt: Implement signed Q16.16 multiplication and division in utility.c. Round multiplication to nearest with ties away from zero. Division truncates toward zero. Saturate results to INT32_MIN/MAX and report division by zero as the signed saturation matching the numerator (zero divided by zero returns zero).
instruction: Implement signed Q16.16 multiplication and division in utility.c. Round multiplication to nearest with ties away from zero. Division truncates toward zero. Saturate results to INT32_MIN/MAX and report division by zero as the signed saturation matching the numerator (zero divided by zero returns zero).
